field.name: test_with_demo_response
field.invisible: not enable_card_wise_journal or use_payment_terminal not in ['moneris_cloud', 'moneris_cloud_go', 'clover_cloud']

field.name: demo_card_name
field.invisible: not test_with_demo_response or not enable_card_wise_journal or use_payment_terminal not in ['moneris_cloud', 'moneris_cloud_go', 'clover_cloud']
